summary: Nagarik Push Notification System tested successfully. Backend: 22/22 tests PASSED covering notification dispatch (multi-channel), throttling, notification log, acknowledgement, preferences CRUD, and auto-trigger from route monitoring. Frontend: Command Center shows notification status indicator ('Sent to guardian (7 pending)') for DEV-001.

test_categories.authentication: 5 PASS - All notification endpoints return 401/403 without auth
test_categories.notification_dispatch: 4 PASS - High/critical severity triggers SMS, medium/low does not
test_categories.throttling: 2 PASS - Same event_type within cooldown returns 'throttled', critical bypasses throttle
test_categories.notification_log: 2 PASS - GET /notifications/log returns history with proper structure
test_categories.acknowledgement: 2 PASS - POST /notifications/{id}/acknowledge marks as acknowledged, 404 for invalid ID
test_categories.preferences: 3 PASS - GET/PUT preferences works with push_enabled, sms_enabled, severity_threshold, quiet_hours
test_categories.route_monitor_integration: 2 PASS - Route monitor responses include notification_summary
test_categories.sms_severity_routing: 2 PASS - SMS only sent for high/critical severity

notification_status_indicator.format_matches: PASS - Text matches expected 'Sent to guardian (X pending)' format

cooldowns_verified.critical_incident: 60s (1 min) - bypasses throttle for critical severity

auto_trigger_integration.route_monitor_response: Includes notification_summary with has_alerts, unacknowledged count

mocked_apis.push_notification: FCM stub - logs only (awaits real Firebase integration)
mocked_apis.sms_notification: Twilio stub - logs only (awaits real Twilio integration)

critical_code_review_comments: Notification dispatch correctly routes to 3 channels: in_app, push, sms based on severity
SMS only sent for severity >= high (rank 2+), correctly filtering out low/medium
Critical severity bypasses throttle as designed
Notification preferences UPSERT works correctly with ON CONFLICT
notification_summary correctly included in route monitor responses for Command Center
seed_data_creation: None - used existing DEV-001 device and guardian data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push Notification System complete. All 6 endpoints tested and working. Key points: 1) notification dispatch sends to in_app+push+sms channels based on severity, 2) SMS only for high/critical severity, 3) throttling works per event_type with configurable cooldowns, 4) critical severity bypasses throttle, 5) Command Center shows notification status 'Sent to guardian (X pending)' or 'Acknowledged by guardian', 6) Push and SMS are STUB implementations (log-only).
